---
title: "Social Protection Project"
author: "Farhan"
format: pdf
editor: visual
project:
  execute-dir: project
---

## Introduction

In order for Field Data Analysis our group will analyze which social protection program is the most associate with the reducing poverty gap between Unconditional Cash Transfer and Conditional Cash Transfer.

## Data Sources

We use data provided by ASPIRE World Bank

```{r}
1 + 1
```

## Starting with library and Dataset

You can add options to executable code like this

```{r}
#install.packages("here")
library(here)
library(tidyverse)

here()

df <- read.csv(here("data/PER-Table1-Key-Indicators.csv"))

```

The `echo: false` option disables the printing of code (only output is displayed).

`{echo:false} {r} summary(df)`
